title: smux template
description: A reusable tmux layout. One template per file; the file name (without .toml) is the template name.

match.description: Marker patterns that auto-detect this template for a folder. Each entry is an exact filename or a simple glob (* / ?), e.g. "Cargo.toml" or "nuxt.config.*".

match_dependencies.description: package.json dependency names that also auto-detect this template, e.g. "react". A folder matches when its package.json lists any of these as a dependency; useful for project types without a distinctive marker file.

priority.description: Tie-breaker when several templates match the same folder; higher wins. Lets a meta-framework (e.g. next, which also depends on react) beat its base.

root.description: Optional session root; accepted by smux config.

startup_window.description: Window name focused after session creation.

startup_pane.description: Zero-based pane index within the startup window.

pre_command.description: Runs in each pane before the pane or window command.

layout.description: tmux window layout name passed to tmux select-layout.

synchronize.description: Enables tmux synchronized panes for the window.

layout.description: Split direction, optionally followed by a tmux size such as 40%.

zoom.description: Zooms this pane after the window has been created. At most one pane per window may set zoom = true.
